name: design-scraper
description: Scrape and organize design inspiration assets from Dribbble, Mobbin, App Store, Behance, Pinterest, and Awwwards with Playwright as the default fetch backend.

interface.shortDescription: Scrape design inspiration assets with Playwright
interface.longDescription: Collect design inspiration from supported sources, download original assets when possible, organize them into a local library, and run post-processing for color extraction, dedupe, and preview generation.
defaultPrompt: Scrape these Dribbble links into a local project folder.
Save inspiration assets from these design URLs.
Download and organize these design references.
